channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Litter in tree pits, 5th March
item.description:
Just needs maintenance I the tree pits where flowers are.

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A bunch of old furniture on the grass verge, 5th March
item.description:
A bunch of old sofas stacked on the grass verge. Doesn’t look like it’s put out for collection, as it has been there for a few days now. Please arrange to remove it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Braemar Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trash buildup, 5th March
item.description:
This box is constantly being used as trash site for bottles, clothes and more this particular piece had been here for weeks now

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Majendie Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped fridge/freezer, 5th March
item.description:
Fridge/freezer flytipped on corner of Alexandra Drive and Hawke Road. This is private land that the council has picked up flytipping from before—it is a constant problem.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 78, Alexandra Drive, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Extensive littering St Francis Road SE22 8DE, 5th March
item.description:
Again - Extensive littering across st Francis road needs to be cleaned by Southwark cleaning team. A full street clean is needed. Once again extensive littering has happened in less than 5 days after local residents had to pick litter because Southwark cleaning team are not doing frequent enough cleaning. In less that 5 days extensive littering has taken place. Important note: please do not close this cleaning request until the litter has been cleaned from street as this has happened previously and litter has remained on the streets for weeks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, St. Francis Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag of rubble and glass, 5th March
item.description:
This has been here for months with the council doing nothing about it. The kid is full of younger kids can we get this cleared up before it becomes a larger issue post a child being hurt. Thanks in advance

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Majendie Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 5th March
item.description:
Near Sainsbury’s entrance to park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Franklin Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped here on a consistent basis, 5th March
item.description:
There is rubbish dumped here more often than not. Some deterrent would be good.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Paston Crescent, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 93 Brondesbury villas by the curb in the road, 5th March
item.description:
Just now the bin men emptied the bins and dropped too much litter onto the road and did not pick it up If this rubbish ends up in our nearby drains when it rains the rain will cause the road to flood. Please help us

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog park bins need more frequent collection, 5th March
item.description:
Bins overflowing, please collect more regularly

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Deptford Church Street, Deptford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped, 5th March
item.description:
Yet another mattress and building materials dumped here again! At what point do we start installing deterrents, signs or cameras? This has got to be cheaper than constantly sending out people to pick up after those flytipping at this space. I do wonder why Greenwich council struggles to manage this and pet fouling throughout our streets. Perhaps fines for offenders might raise the capital it needs and deter the repeated action.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brewery Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 39 harvist road, 5th March
item.description:
This property consists of six flats using communal recycling bins located in the front garden. In this context, individual residents cannot control how other households dispose of their recycling. Refusing to collect the entire communal bin due to contamination therefore penalises residents who are complying with the rules and leads to bins becoming increasingly overfilled. This is a recurring issue, not an isolated missed collection. Treating communal bins in the same way as individual household bins is not effective and results in ongoing service failure. In communal settings, contamination should be addressed through resident guidance, signage, or engagement with building management, rather than repeated refusal to collect. I would therefore ask that this situation is reviewed and that appropriate measures are put in place to ensure collections can proceed. I would also like to reiterate that during the recent organic waste (grey bin) collection, the crew left the bin area in a poor condition, with waste left scattered in the garden.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harvist Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 39 harvist road, 5th March
item.description:
Fly tipping on garden on a Brent Council State

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harvist Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping by council, 5th March
item.description:
Council flytip bags of rubbish on the street for days. This subsequently attracts others to join the fly-tipping party. Kindly collect all waste from Howard Road and Church Walk today

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Howard Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left in empty garden of disused house, duvet and blanket, 5th March
